content: Pygame-specific delta-time pitfalls: forgetting clock.tick(fps) lets the loop run unbounded; clock.get_time() returns only the last frame's delta, not elapsed wall time; tying any per-frame increment directly to frame count instead of delta/tick count silently reintroduces frame-rate-dependent behavior even when a delta-time variable exists elsewhere in the codebase. Clock.tick() timing is not guaranteed precise on all platforms (SDL_Delay-based).
